title: Unprepared for Iranian drones, U.S. and partners seek Ukraine’s help
summary_full: Swarms of low-cost drones used by the Russians in Ukraine have been breaching U.S. air defense systems and striking targets across the Middle East.
summary_public: Swarms of low-cost drones used by the Russians in Ukraine have been breaching U.S. air defense systems and striking targets across the Middle East.
